'''Big Bone''' is the item that is used to adjust the size of your pup. <br>

It has been replaced by the [[Magnifying Bone]].
== Trivia ==
* The items were added to the original Doggy Talents.
* Legacy:
* ''Crafting recipe''
* [[File:https://github.com/DashieDev/DoggyTalentsNext/assets/122363761/e41691aa-1e4c-47ee-b11c-8abd25e2eb91|big_bone]]
* ''Big Bone''
